---
title: "The apple of discord - by Charlotte Mary Yonge(1864)"
year: 1864
slug: "The apple of discord"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


### Online text of*The apple of discord*

### [Click here to read or download](http://books.google.co.uk/books?id=4AQJAAAAQAAJ&printsec=titlepage&client=firefox-a#PPT4,M1)
